prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-TDFS-10PC-55L-SLVR Product Type: TOOLS Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: 10pc Professional Quality Tapered Diamond Abrasive Hobby File Set (Assorted Grits) Description: This hobby file set has 10 different files for an array of different jobs and tasks whether it is for models, or detailed metal work.

Each file is 5.5" in length and features small 2.5" dipped rubber handles for precision craftsmanship. Includes PVC storage pouch.

There are nine flat files with three different widths and one round file. The set has varied grits identified by the handle color.

Red: 180 Grit
Yellow: 260 Grit
Green: 360 Grit

Because of its incredible variety this file set can help on almost any project type. Make sure to pick one up today. Search Terms: diamond dust abrasive files; home hobby file set; DIY small files; filing tools crafting metal working home improvement Features: - Overall Length: 5 1/2"(140mm) - Professional Quality - 180, 260, 360 Grits - 9 Flat Files and 1 Round File - Comes with convenient PVC pouch for storage === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Universal Tool 10-pc Diamond Abrasive Hobby File Set

openai.item_name: Universal Tool 10-Pc 5.5 In Tapered Diamond Abrasive File Set

anthropic.title_differentiation: 9 Flat And 1 Round File, 180-360 Grit Assorted, 55 Inch Length, Rubber Handles, PVC Storage Pouch
